LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.stages.0.description: 蓬加果讓我感到放鬆和充滿活力，這是荒野中難得的安慰。
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.stages.0.label: 蓬加溫暖
LanguageData.AmbrosiaWithdrawal.stages.1.description: 我一直感到沉重和寒冷。我從來沒想過我會這麼想要一塊潘加果。
LanguageData.AmbrosiaWithdrawal.stages.1.label: 蓬加撤退
LanguageData.VSIE_HadNiceChatWithBeer.stages.0.label: 邊喝酒邊聊得很開心
LanguageData.VSIE_HadNiceChatWithBeer.stages.0.descri: 我很享受這次閒聊和我手上的瓶子。
LanguageData.VSIE_AttendedBingeParty.stages.0.label: 參加營地井噴
LanguageData.VSIE_AttendedBingeParty.stages.0.descrip: 我在營地井噴中度過了一段愉快的時光。
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantCitizenship_ColonistPrese: 變種人作為同胞生活在我們身邊。殖民地因此變得更強大。
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantMasters_MutantColonistPre: 群體受到突變力量的引導，這是理所當然的。
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantMasters_NonMutantSlavePre: 未突變的勞動力在突變的權威之下服務。
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantPurge_MutantColonistPrese: 變種人在群體內自由生活。這是站不住腳的。
即使是被鎖住的突變體仍然是對群體純潔性的冒犯。
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantSlaves_MutantColonistPres: 變種人在本應是奴隸的時候卻成為了自由的殖民者。
變種人從鎖鏈中解放出來
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantSlaves_SlaveStatus.stages: 殖民地有變異奴隸可供剝削和控制。
這裡應該有被鎖鏈鎖住的變異勞動，而不是浪費的自由。
LanguageData.Greenway_SecondClassMutants_MutantSlaveP: 在殖民地真正的公民之下，突變種正在被正確使用。
突變體保留在原來的位置
變種人在這裡，建立屬於他們的未來。
LanguageData.Greenway_Utobitha_NonMutantPresent.stage: 非變種人仍然存在於一個本應屬於變種人的家園。
LanguageData.DryadDied.stages.0.description: 我的樹父的護樹人永遠消失了。我們會想念你的，小傢伙。
LanguageData.DryadDied.stages.0.label: 護樹人死了
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.0.desc: 我很高興與樹父有聯繫。
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.1.desc: 沒有與樹父的聯繫，我感到與大自然脫節。
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.2.desc: 沒有與樹父的聯繫，我感到與大自然脫節。
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.3.desc: 沒有與樹父的聯繫，我感到與大自然脫節。
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.4.desc: 沒有與樹父的聯繫，我感到與大自然脫節。
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.5.desc: 沒有與樹父的聯繫，我感到與大自然脫節。
LanguageData.ConnectedTreeDied.stages.0.description: 我的樹……它平靜的存在變成了純粹的痛苦，然後沉默了。它的痛苦在我腦海中迴響…
LanguageData.ConnectedTreeDied.stages.0.label: 樹父之死
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝以 pungashine 為基底的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_ChemshineAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝了以腐腸為基礎的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.stages.0.description: 我喝了一瓶冰涼的自製沙士。一個小奢侈。
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.stages.0.label: 喝了自製的沙士
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝以琴酒為基礎的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝以蜂蜜酒為基底的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝以龍舌蘭為基底的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝以伏特加為基礎的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝了以威士忌為基礎的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.stages.0.label: 喝了以酒為基底的原子雞尾酒
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedDigestibleResurrectorNanites: 服用那劑阿庫拉水後，我感覺自己所向無敵。
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButterHigh.stages.0.label: 婆羅門蘑菇黃油含量很高
LanguageData.ColdBath.stages.0.label: 冷水澡堂跳水
LanguageData.HeatedPool.stages.0.description: 浴室的溫水游泳池讓人非常放鬆。
LanguageData.HeatedPool.stages.0.label: 浴場恆溫泳池
LanguageData.HotBath.stages.0.label: 泡熱水澡
LanguageData.HotShower.stages.0.description: 我在浴室裡洗了個熱水澡。
LanguageData.HotShower.stages.0.label: 熱水澡堂淋浴
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.description: 我知道這裡是荒地，但每天吃同樣的沉悶的糞便仍然會讓人疲憊不堪。
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.description: 從晚餐主食、商隊發現的東西到篝火實驗，這裡的菜單仍然令人驚訝地豐富。
LanguageData.WestTek_MastersArmy.stages.0.description: This super mutant slave exists to serve in the Master's Army, and takes grim pride in that purpose.
LanguageData.WestTek_MastersArmy.stages.0.label: Master's Army
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.0.descript: I had to clean Whitespring propaganda. I did take a quick peek. Maybe it's not all lies?
LanguageData.VFED_CleanedPropaganda.stages.0.label: cleaned Whitespring propaganda
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.0.descriptio: We will show the Whitespring Enclave what freedom means.
LanguageData.VFED_JoinedDeserters.stages.0.label: joined the Brotherhood
LanguageData.VFEE_TerribleExhibit.stages.0.descriptio: I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
LanguageData.VFEE_TheGreat.stages.0.description: I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
LanguageData.GrandioseBestowingCeremony.stages.0.desc: The inauguration was like a taste of true grandeur, and a moment of participation in something greater.
LanguageData.HonorableBestowingCeremony.stages.0.desc: The inauguration brought a sense of dignity and honor to the participants.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.0.description: I had to preside in an awful presidential suite. It's like a deliberate insult from my inferiors.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.0.label: awful presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.1.description: I had to preside in a dull presidential suite. It clearly diminished my stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.1.label: dull presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.2.description: I had to preside in a mediocre presidential suite. It didn't express my stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.2.label: mediocre presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.6.description: I presided in a very impressive presidential suite. It expressed noticeable stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.6.label: very impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.7.description: I presided in an extremely impressive presidential suite. It effectively demonstrated my stature.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.7.label: extremely impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.8.description: I presided in an unbelievably impressive presidential suite. The commoners will be amazed at my highness.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.8.label: unbelievably impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.9.description: I presided in a heavenly presidential suite. It matched my grace and nobility.
LanguageData.ReignedInThroneroom.stages.9.label: wondrously impressive presidential suite
LanguageData.TerribleBestowingCeremony.stages.0.descr: The inauguration somehow felt petty and self-indulgent at the same time.
LanguageData.TerribleBestowingCeremony.stages.0.label: terrible inauguration
LanguageData.UnimpressiveBestowingCeremony.stages.0.d: The inauguration felt mechanical and lifeless.
